series_metadata.series_description: Reports submitted by employee organizations as required by law, outlining affiliations, officers, revenues, and financial information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain documents for seven (7) years due to public inquiry and statistical data. ; Paper: Paper copies are converted to electronic format. Once paper document has been converted it may be destroyed. Retain electronic format for seven (7) years due to public inquires and statistical data., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
